sample_hooks: The moment I knew I was ready to quit my job was whenever I started making more in online sales in a day than I was earning with my paycheck in my corporate job.

When I leave Vietnam, I'm constantly longing to come back. Traveling in the past for me was always about escaping. Here, I feel like I have nothing to escape from.
Initially, people thought that we were crazy for wanting to turn an abandoned baseball stadium into apartments. There were 2,000 cash-for-clunker cars parked on the infield.
